description:
Features:

  • - Two 13.2-gallon compartments separate dirty and clean clothes efficiently
  • - Portable design with two handles for easy relocation
  • - Detachable, washable cloth bags simplify laundry management
  • - Powder-coated metal frame and elegant bamboo ensure longevity
  • - Easy to assemble

Specification:

  • - Color: Brown, Cream White
  • - Materials: Bamboo
  • - Overall Dimension: 20.5" L x 12.6" W x 24.8" H
  • - Capacity: 26.4 gal
  • - Weight Capacity: 22 lbs.

Package Includes:

  • - 1 x Laundry Basket
  • - 1 x Manual
